ogTitle: Glenrowan vs Glenrowan West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glenrowan and Glenrowan West.
heading: Glenrowan vs Glenrowan West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glenrowan, Victoria and Glenrowan West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glenrowan has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Glenrowan West (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glenrowan or Glenrowan West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glenrowan has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Glenrowan West scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glenrowan scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Glenrowan West scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glenrowan or Glenrowan West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glenrowan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
